name_en: 《Burgundy 🍷》🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25B heavyweight contender, don't blink😉, small bucket bag, instantly falling for the fairy-like cream white. Classic quilted stitching + mini double C logo, low-key and classy.· Pull the drawstring to instantly become a "🤩🤩 little lucky bag", full of anti-theft skills.· The chain ⛓️ length can be shoulder, crossbody, or slung casually, friendly for petite frames. Instantly photogenic with a Southern France vacation vibe! This one is on the "heirloom" list, sisters waiting for 25B, go for it! The elegance of the quilted pattern, the embellishment of the gold chain, this black handbag is simply too high-end. Large and small pocket design, practical and stylish, paired with gold metal ring details, texture maxed out~ Light luxury style! 4775 Dimensions: 12.5×10×7cm
